user_query: show me anomaly routes departing from albania
user_intent_summary: Identify anomalous routes where flights depart from airports in Albania.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: tipologia_raw contains departure and arrival airport codes (IATA) and nationality codes. Filtering for 'alb' (Albania) in codice_paese_part restricts to Albanian departures. Grouping by [areoporto_partenza, areoporto_arrivo] yields route-level aggregates. allarmati is the count of alarmed passengers/events, the metric to monitor for anomalies.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: allarmi_raw includes departure/arrival airport codes and country codes. Filtering for 'alb' restricts to Albanian-origin events. Grouping by [areoporto_partenza, areoporto_arrivo] provides route-level analysis. tot represents the total events/alarms per route, the metric to flag anomalies.
